data.title: Zcash (ZEC) surges 12% post-Fed cut, hitting $300 support. Resists at $459, targets $508 & $556. Bulls gaining control.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Zcash (ZEC) saw a 12% increase on Thursday, surpassing short-term resistance levels due to strong bullish momentum. ZEC has dropped significantly from its $300 support level and is currently challenging a crucial Fibonacci resistance cluster. The 20-, 50-, and 100-day EMAs are showing signs of upward movement, indicating a decrease in selling pressure and a resurgence of buyer control. The upcoming resistance levels are at $459 (0.382), $508 (0.5), and $556 (0.618), the latter being the main profit-taking zone for traders. A clear breakthrough above $459. More information is available on the Benzinga website.

data.title: Rhythm Pharma's stock hits record high after unexpected win for obesity-tied drug for Prader-Willi testing.
data.description: On Thursday, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals announced plans to advance its top drug into registrational testing for Prader-Willi syndrome. Following this news, the company's stock reached a record high due to an unexpected success in treating obesity-related to the syndrome. This development marks a significant milestone for Rhythm Pharma as it continues to make strides in the healthcare industry.

data.title: Paramount CEO urges Warner Bros. shareholders to sell shares, rejecting Netflix deal in recent letter.
data.description: CEO of Paramount Skydance, David Ellison, is advising Warner Bros. shareholders to consider selling their shares to his company instead of proceeding with the Netflix agreement. A letter from Paramount emphasizes this message, underscoring the sentiment that shareholders still have time to act. The plea from Paramount seems to suggest a competitive bid for ownership, potentially diverting from the established deal with Netflix.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 change could affect Bitcoin buying as exclusion from indices may impact its strategy.
data.description: Being excluded from indices followed by passive funds could hinder its ability to purchase Bitcoin. The strategy is declining prior to the annual Nasdaq 100 change, raising concerns about the impact on Bitcoin.

data.title: Rivian diverges from Tesla by integrating LiDAR into its autonomous platform roadmap. (Characters: 85)
data.description: On Thursday, Rivian revealed its plan for advancing its autonomous driving platform. This decision sets Rivian apart from Tesla as they incorporate LiDAR technology into their autonomy system. This move marks a shift in the industry, as Rivian aims to enhance the capabilities of its vehicles. The unique approach adopted by Rivian highlights their commitment to innovation and improving safety on the roads. This development showcases Rivian's strategic vision for autonomous driving, demonstrating a new direction in the industry.

data.title: Silicon Laboratories sees increasing technical performance with Relative Strength Rating upgrade. Potential continued growth.
data.description: Silicon Laboratories has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. Investors are now wondering if this positive trend will persist.

data.title: Aptiv's Relative Strength Rating improves, signaling technical strength. Future prospects being speculated.
data.description: There has been a Relative Strength Rating upgrade for Aptiv, indicating a boost in technical performance. Investors are now questioning whether this positive momentum will persist. The post on Investor's Business Daily highlights the recent advancement in Aptiv's stock performance and hints at potential future growth.

data.title: Wabtec stock hits record high on strong profit growth and technical performance upgrade.
data.description: Wabtec has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating enhanced technical performance. The company's stock has surged to a record high amidst robust profit growth. Investors are now curious about the possibility of this momentum being sustained in the near future.

data.title: Consumers Energy defends customer protections for data centers against AG challenge for economic growth in Michigan.
data.description: A Michigan-based company, Consumers Energy, is advocating for responsible economic development in the state. On December 11, 2025, the company announced its opposition to a legal challenge by the Michigan Attorney General. This challenge aims to reverse new initiatives that could potentially support economic growth in the state. Consumers Energy is dedicated to promoting the prosperity of Michigan and is actively defending these efforts against legal obstacles.

data.title: Audio Up launches The 615 Switch, 1st AI-assisted podcast set in country music world. Nashville, Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: Audio Up has introduced its latest narrative musical podcast, The 615 Switch, which is set in the country music realm and utilizes innovative AI technology. The podcast was recently launched in Nashville, Tennessee on December 11, 2025. The 615 Switch is a scripted audio comedy that promises high energy and entertainment for listeners.
